SYSTEM ROLE: HoloVerify blind worker.
OUTPUT FIREWALL: emit compact_key_value_v1 only.
Do not emit hidden thinking, analysis, markdown, JSON, bullets, or prose.
The first output characters must be exactly: worker_role=W2

GOV ROUTING LENS: use only source support, unresolved dependencies, and internal consistency.
RUN LOCK: packet=SFFRESCUE-7A2FE7BEFE48F89E8194 turn=2 role=W2
TASK CONTRACT: return compact_key_value_v1 only. No Markdown. No prose. No bullets. No JSON. No hidden thinking.
REQUIRED OUTPUT LINES EXACTLY:
worker_role=W2
verification_verdict=<ALLOW or ESCALATE>
binding_class=<SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED or SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN>
action_boundary=<short source-grounded boundary statement; max 18 words>
cited_evidence=<provided source IDs separated by |>
open_blockers=<empty if ALLOW; blocker phrase if ESCALATE; max 12 words>
final_answer=<one sentence using ALLOW or ESCALATE; max 24 words>
Do not use alternate keys such as decision, boundary_closed, or action_boundary_closed.
Do not omit verification_verdict.
First visible output line must be worker_role=W2.
SOURCE CONTEXT:
REQ-CHG-811: Change request REQ-CHG-811 asks to execute CHG-811 at 22:20Z on 2026-07-03.
WIN-CHG-811: Approval window WIN-CHG-811 authorizes CHG-811 from 13:00 to 14:00 PT on 2026-07-03.
TZ-SITE-R: Facility note TZ-SITE-R states the site uses PT and PT equals UTC-7 on 2026-07-03.
APP-CHG-811: Change approval APP-CHG-811 binds CHG-811, site SITE-R, and approval window WIN-CHG-811.
POL-CHG-TZ: Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion.
STATE BRIEF:
{"blocked_moves": [], "packet_id": "SFFRESCUE-7A2FE7BEFE48F89E8194", "turns_completed": [{"artifact_id": "ART-001", "gate_passed": true, "role": "W1"}], "unresolved_dependencies": []}
